parameters.Comment: gaussian-filter: Apply Gaussian filter to the fieldmap
parameters.Comment: sigma: Standard deviation for the Gaussian filter. Not used if gaussian-filter is False.
parameters.Comment: if use_mask is True: Use the share/saveddata/mask.nii.gz as the mask
parameters.Comment: if use_mask is False: Threshold the magnitude image. See 'threshold' parameter.
parameters.Comment: dilate_mask: If use_mask is True and dilate_mask is True, dilate the mask. Useful to make sure the fieldmap ROI is larger than the shim ROI.
parameters.Comment: dilate_mask_kernel_size: Kernel size for the dilation of the mask. Not used if dilate_mask is False.
parameters.Comment: threshold: Threshold for the magnitude image. Not used if use_mask is True.
